flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Slippery Rock University of Pennsylvania rose 13% between 2006 and 2009 ($8.9k → $10.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Slippery Rock University of Pennsylvania fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Slippery Rock University of Pennsylvania rose 11% between 2006 and 2009 (51.8% → 57.7%).
